META_DESCRIPTION: Talk to the team that built FastComments. Email, phone, sales call, or signed-in help desk. 24-hour SLA, Pacific business hours, real humans.
CHANNELS_DESCRIPTION: Click to decode each address. We hide them from scrapers, not from people.
CHANNEL_DESC_SALES_CALL: Book 30 minutes with our team. Pricing, integration, migration questions: we'll walk you through it.
CHANNEL_DESC_SUPPORT_EMAIL: Bug reports, integration help, account issues. Every email gets a reply within 24 hours, faster during Pacific business hours.
CHANNEL_DESC_SALES_EMAIL: Pricing questions, custom contracts, volume deals, security reviews. Ping us before procurement does.
CHANNEL_DESC_PHONE: Mon-Fri, 9-5 Pacific. Email lands faster, but the line is open when you want an actual voice on the other end.
CHANNEL_DESC_HELP_DESK: The fastest path if you already have an account. Tickets route straight to engineering with a 24-hour SLA.
BOT_PROTECTED_NOTE: Hidden from scrapers. Click to view.
FOOTNOTE_BODY: Already have an account? The help desk is the fastest path. New here? Spin one up free and start a thread with us.
